SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.postgres

Class PostgresConnectionPool.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.providers.postgres.PostgresConnectionPool.Builder
Enclosing class:
PostgresConnectionPool
public static final class PostgresConnectionPool.Builder extends Object
Builder for PostgresConnectionPool. Set fields via typed setters, or pass a raw connection_string via connectionString(String).
See Also:
  • Rust PostgresConnectionPool::new
